rsmod_api_status: partial - no hitsplat enum or type system documented in api/hit-plugin

overview.description: A hitsplat is the damage/status icon appearing above a player, NPC, or monster during combat. It displays the numerical effect on hitpoints or skill levels.
overview.max_hit_visuals: Hits dealing max damage have a unique 'trimmed' appearance. Default threshold: 10+ damage. Setting configurable.
overview.tinted_hitsplats: Other players' hitsplats are tinted a different color to distinguish from your own. Configurable in Settings > Activities.
overview.pvp_overkill: Critical PvP hitsplats show actual damage number even if it exceeds target's remaining HP (overkill), but only the remaining HP amount is actually dealt.

damage_types.description: Regular damage from melee, magic, ranged, agility obstacles, thieving traps, etc.
A hit of zero; inflicts no damage. Indicates a missed or blocked attack.
Shown when damaging shields of bosses (Hueycoatl, Kephri, Verzik Vitur, The Nightmare, Tempoross). Also indicates protected attacks (Moons of Peril, Yama).
Shown when damaging Zalcano's stone armour.
Shown when draining a target's prayer (Phantom Muspah shield, Frost Nagua).
Shown when The Nightmare's totems are charged/healed.
Shown when The Nightmare's totems are uncharged/damaged by parasites.
Poise damage dealt to Tumeken's Warden or Elidinis' Warden during phase 2.
Wintertodt's drain on the player's warmth meter.
Dodged damage from a negated non-typeless attack. Currently unused in live game.
Damage to a sailing ship. Max hitsplat variant currently unused.

status_types.description: Poison damage at set intervals. Decreases over time. Can appear from poison karambwan or Shilo mist.
Venom damage at set intervals. Increases over time, capped at 20.
Disease drains player stats at set intervals, excluding Hitpoints and Prayer.
Corruption drains prayer points over a short period.
Bleed DoT damage from Vardorvis Swinging Axes or Custodia stalkers' special attack.
Burn inflicted by Eclipse moon armour set, burning claws special, or scorching bow special. Also Yama.
Corrosion from Shellbane Gryphon spit. Deals small repeated damage until expiry or equipment unequipped.

other_types.description: HP healing. Mostly reserved for boss encounters. Shows on players with Soulreaper axe or Sailing boat repair.
Sanity drain from Lost Souls and The Whisperer inside the Shadow Realm.
Doom handicap in Fortis Colosseum. Certain doom stacks instantly kill the player.
HP/Defence restoration from Vasa Nistirio glowing crystals, Kephri scarab shield restoration, Palm of Resourcefulness growth.
Crocodile damage towards Palm of Resourcefulness.

rsmod_api_gaps: No HitsplatType enum found for all types above
hit-plugin may need extension to support all hitsplat color variations
Tinted hitsplat system for other-player visibility needs implementation
Max hitsplat visual threshold (default 10+) needs player setting hook
pvp_overkill display logic needs separate client-display flag
Status effect hitsplats (poison, venom, disease) need separate periodic tick scheduling
needed_for_rsmod: Full HitsplatType enum with all types
Heal hitsplat for food / prayer restore
Prayer drain hitsplat for smite/special attacks
